flowchart TB "Signup & Subscription Funnel"
  A[Visit Landing] --> B[Click Sign Up]
  B --> C[Verify Email]
  C --> D[Enter Trial]
  D --> E{Subscribe?}
  E -->|yes| F[Complete Payment]
  E -->|no| G[Churn]
  F --> H[Active Subscriber]
  class A start
  class B process
  class C process
  class D success
  class E decision
  class F success
  class G neutral
  class H danger
